Sweetie’s Note<3

Hello Lovelies!

This is another bot idea that has just been floating around in my brain. I will probably make some other alts with this guy (all of them probably first meet because it’s easier), so expect to be seeing him again soon. I am also working on the reverse of my Viktoria bot and continuation on the lore surrounding them.

I will not tolerate any mention of torture, rape, or any crazy weird things you do in your chats. Keep that to yourself, please and thank you.

Anyways, I hope you all have a splendid day or night! <3
